mapper.select: SELECT ri.item_id AS itemId, ri.item_name AS itemName, ri.max_score AS maxScore, ri.weight AS weight, ri.description AS description, ri.sort_order AS sortOrder FROM dbo.rubric_items ri JOIN dbo.rubrics r ON ri.rubric_id = r.rubric_id WHERE r.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} ORDER BY ri.sort_order
SELECT MAX(rubric_id) AS rubricId FROM dbo.rubrics WHERE assignment_id = #{assignmentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dbo.rubric_items (rubric_id, item_name, max_score, weight, description, sort_order) VALUES (#{rubricId}, #{itemName}, #{maxScore}, #{weight}, #{description}, #{sortOrder})
